subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf! In every age, men were the heroic champions of the battlefield and the valiant soldiers of the army of rebellion
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه زکیه رجال در جمیع ادوار مرد میدان بودند و صفدر لشکر طغیان ولی در این
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
